interpretation.protease_peptidase: Primary search space for collagenase/protease production hypotheses.
interpretation.collagenase_candidate: Direct keyword hits are strong clues but require sequence/domain validation.
interpretation.secondary_metabolism: BGC-related potential may compete with or complement enzyme production depending on stress state.
interpretation.transport: Transporters constrain substrate uptake and secretion of extracellular products.
